channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Brigandine: Abyss demo now available for PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Try out the first two chapters of each story mode.

A demo for fantasy war strategy RPG Brigandine: Abyss is now available for PC Steam, developer Happinet Corporation announced. PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and Switch 2 versions will follow at a later date.

The demo features the first two chapters from both the “Gran Dragnica” and “Scarlet Will” story modes, allowing users to try out the early story, party formation, and combat. Save data from the demo cannot be transferred to the full release.

Brigandine: Abyss is due out for PC Steam on August 26, followed by PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and Switch 2 and August 27.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/brigandine-abyss-demo-now-available-for-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Tekken 8 DLC character Yujiro Hanma from the Baki series announced
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Xbox Series

Due out this winter.

Bandai Namco has announced Tekken 8 Season 3 downloadable content character Yujiro Hanma from the Baki series. He will launch in early 2027.

Tekken 8 is available now for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and PC via Steam.

Watch a teaser trailer below.

DLC Character Yujiro Hanma Teaser Trailer

English

Japanese



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/tekken-8-dlc-character-yujiro-hanma-from-the-baki-series-announced
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Unreal Engine 6 announced with Rocket League reveal
item.content:encoded:
A "new era" of Rocket League is on the way.

Psyonix revealed a “new era” of free-to-play vehicular soccer game Rocket League at Rocket League Championship Series 2026: Paris Major, which showcased the game running on Unreal Engine 6.

The teaser trailer marks the first reveal of the successor to Unreal Engine 5, which first debuted during the launch of the PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series generation in 2020.

Rocket League is available now for PlayStation 4, Xbox One, Switch, and PC, Mac, and Linux.

Watch the reveal trailer below.

Rocket League Unreal Engine 6 Reveal Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/unreal-engine-6-announced-with-rocket-league-reveal
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
